center.name: 亞薩瓦群島
center.summary: 亞薩瓦群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑脸鹦雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pink-billed parrotfinch is endemic to Fiji, thought to be only found in the wetter central and eastern parts of the largest island, Viti Levu but has also been observed on the Yasawa Islands to the north-west in 2012
